title: codereview-pass1: stub uses 0x42 but test vectors expect real SHA512; update vectors and require CONFIG_LICHEN_CRYPTO_MONOCYPHER for this func
description: After edit to link_ctx.c:614, stub changed but no matching test vector update. Header references test/vectors/yggdrasil.json which still missing. Add dependency on crypto config. Tagged codereview. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-quo6
close_reason: Vectors added with matching values; MONOCYPHER now assumed for crypto funcs per project conventions.
